column1: # Describes which STEP_1 output files get published to the server.
# Only the final AGS (All Gene Set) FASTA is published by default; every
# intermediate output defaults to `no`. Flip to `yes` to expose homolog
# ----- Final AGS (All Gene Set): RGS + confirmed homologs -----
# dir_label = short (<=3 words) descriptor shown as the folder's subtitle on the server.

column6: Final homolog set: RGS + reciprocal-BLAST-confirmed candidates.
